_comment: R2-ACC-INDUSTRIAL SMTP example. Copy into appsettings + a secret store. NEVER commit real credentials. Prefer an authenticated enterprise relay or M365 SMTP relay; use a dev sink (Mailpit/MailHog) in development.

Smtp._authModes: None (internal relay by IP) | Basic (username/password from secret store) | M365 (app/OAuth)
Smtp._password: DO NOT put a password here — inject Smtp__Password via environment/secret store at deploy time
